_meta.description: Collector-derived contract for the multipage tests matrix view. Schema v2 adds suite_roles, unenrolled variant rows, flake metrics, and git-tracked test-runs.ndjson history.

summary_metrics.label: Published matrix rows
summary_metrics.derivation: Count rows emitted by the collector for the tests matrix.

summary_metrics.label: Rows with completed runs
summary_metrics.derivation: Count matrix rows whose joined docs/results/*.json file has last_run set.

summary_metrics.label: Rows waiting for results
summary_metrics.derivation: Count matrix rows still marked unavailable after joining published results and enrollment issues.

summary_metrics.label: Flaky matrix rows
summary_metrics.derivation: Count matrix rows with at least two pass/fail status flips in their recorded run history.

rows.derivation: Join docs/data/test-surface.json row with docs/results/bluefin-lts-testing-developer.json; compute pass_rate when scenarios_total > 0; attach suite role and flake metrics.
Join docs/data/test-surface.json row with docs/results/bluefin-lts-testing-smoke.json; compute pass_rate when scenarios_total > 0; attach suite role and flake metrics.

rows.state_reason: Result file exists, but no completed run is published for this matrix cell yet.
rows.derivation: Join docs/data/test-surface.json row with docs/results/bluefin-stable-smoke.json; compute pass_rate when scenarios_total > 0; attach suite role and flake metrics.

rows.state_reason: Result file exists, but no completed run is published for this matrix cell yet.
rows.derivation: Join docs/data/test-surface.json row with docs/results/bluefin-lts-stable-smoke.json; compute pass_rate when scenarios_total > 0; attach suite role and flake metrics.
